# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  nsgName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "dev-access-nsg"
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "eastus"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2023-04-01"
  name: "[parameters('nsgName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
    - name: "AllowRDP"
      properties:
        protocol: "Tcp"
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "3389"
        sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
        destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        access: "Allow"
        priority: 100
        direction: "Inbound"
    - name: "AllowSSH"
      properties:
        protocol: "Tcp"
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "22"
        sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
        destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        access: "Allow"
        priority: 101
        direction: "Inbound"
    - name: "AllowHTTP"
      properties:
        protocol: "Tcp"
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "80"
        sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
        destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        access: "Allow"
        priority: 102
        direction: "Inbound"
    - name: "AllowHTTPS"
      properties:
        protocol: "Tcp"
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "443"
        sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
        destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        access: "Allow"
        priority: 103
        direction: "Inbound"
